tournament.name: South America Regional Championship Santiago 2026 - Devir

decks.notes: The primary focus of this Boros Aggro deck is to overwhelm the opponent with powerful dragons and flying creatures, utilizing cards like Clarion Conqueror, Magmatic Hellkite, and Nova Hellkite. The deck also includes cards like Voice of Victory and Sarkhan, Dragon Ascendant to support the aggressive playstyle. Additionally, the deck includes removal spells like Burst Lightning and Get Lost to maintain board control. The mana base is optimized with cards like Inspiring Vantage and Maelstrom of the Spirit Dragon to ensure a smooth curve and consistent aggression.

This deck focuses on overwhelming the opponent with a fast and aggressive mono-green strategy. By utilizing powerful creatures like Badgermole Cub and Mossborn Hydra, along with mana acceleration from cards like Llanowar Elves and Sapling Nursery, the deck aims to quickly build a threatening board presence. Earthbender Ascension provides a way to push through damage and close out games, while cards like Sazh's Chocobo and Mightform Harmonizer help maintain card advantage and consistency. Overall, this deck aims to quickly establish dominance on the battlefield and overwhelm the opponent before they can react effectively.

The main focus of this deck is to quickly establish board presence and apply pressure to the opponent with aggressive creatures such as Aang, Swift Savior and Aven Interrupter. It also aims to control the board with removal spells like Floodpits Drowner and Seam Rip while protecting its creatures with cards like Spell Snare. The deck also includes card draw options like Enduring Curiosity and Voice of Victory to maintain momentum. Ajani, Outland Chaperone and Elspeth, Storm Slayer provide additional support and finishers. The mana base is designed to support the Azorius color combination effectively.

The main focus of this deck is to quickly ramp up mana with cards like Llanowar Elves and Sapling Nursery, allowing the player to play big creatures like Mossborn Hydra and Lumbering Worldwagon early in the game. The deck also includes cards like Earthbender Ascension and Mightform Harmonizer to buff up creatures and deal damage to the opponent quickly. The inclusion of cards like Badgermole Cub and Sazh's Chocobo helps maintain board presence and pressure the opponent. Overall, the deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with fast, powerful creatures and aggressive plays.

This deck focuses on utilizing aggressive creatures with various control and disruption spells to maintain pressure on the opponent while disrupting their game plan. With a mix of evasion, card draw, and removal, Dimir Aggro aims to quickly establish a board presence and control the tempo of the game through efficient card advantage and strategic combat maneuvers. By blending aggression with disruption, this deck aims to outpace and overwhelm opponents before they can fully execute their own strategies.

The deck focuses on controlling the game through a mix of counter spells, removal, and card draw. Using a combination of instant speed spells and sorceries, the player aims to disrupt the opponent's strategy while building card advantage. By utilizing the Izzet color combination, the deck can efficiently handle a variety of threats while also maintaining a consistent card draw engine. The mana base is carefully constructed to provide the right balance of colors needed to support the deck's game plan. Overall, this deck is designed to outlast and outmaneuver opponents through careful resource management and strategic play.

This deck focuses on quickly ramping up mana with cards like Llanowar Elves and Earthbender Ascension, allowing for early and aggressive plays with creatures like Badgermole Cub and Sazh's Chocobo. It also utilizes cards like Fecund Greenshell and Mightform Harmonizer to generate value and disrupt opponent's strategies. With a mix of efficient creatures and powerful spells, this mono green aggro deck aims to overwhelm opponents with a fast and relentless offense while maintaining a solid presence on the battlefield.

This deck focuses on filling the graveyard with powerful creatures and then bringing them back onto the battlefield through reanimation spells. By utilizing cards like Deceit and Superior Spider-Man, the goal is to overwhelm opponents with a quick and efficient combo strategy. Cards like Doomsday Excruciator and Harvester of Misery provide additional threats, while spells like Bitter Triumph and Requiting Hex help control the board. Utilizing a mix of graveyard interactions and powerful creatures, this deck aims to quickly outpace opponents and win through powerful combos and reanimated threats.

The main concept of this Dimir Aggro deck is to overwhelm the opponent with a combination of aggressive creatures and disruptive spells. By utilizing cards like Floodpits Drowner and Spyglass Siren to control the board, along with Enduring Curiosity to draw cards and Tishana's Tidebinder to tap down blockers, the deck aims to keep the pressure on the opponent while maintaining card advantage. Additional removal spells like Shoot the Sheriff and Requiting Hex help deal with threats, while powerful finishers such as Kaito, Bane of Nightmares and Cecil, Dark Knight aim to close out the game quickly.

The main concept of the deck is to control the board using a variety of spells and abilities to outmaneuver the opponent. This involves using cards such as Gran-Gran and Combustion Technique to control the field, while also utilizing Monument to Endurance and Accumulate Wisdom to maintain card advantage. The deck also includes spells like Abandon Attachments and Spell Snare to disrupt the opponent's strategy, along with Three Steps Ahead and Iroh's Demonstration to stay ahead in the game. Overall, the deck focuses on controlling the game tempo and using powerful control elements to secure victory.

decks.player: Guilherme Vinicius Fragoso De Souza Guivini06
decks.notes: The deck focuses on disrupting and controlling the opponent's strategy using a combination of counter spells, removal spells, and card draw. It aims to maintain board control and outvalue the opponent with efficient removal and card advantage. By efficiently managing resources and controlling the pace of the game, the deck seeks to outlast the opponent and secure victory through superior card advantage and control.

This deck focuses on aggressively building up a board presence using low-cost creatures like Badgermole Cub and Llanowar Elves, while also utilizing cards like Mightform Harmonizer and Earthbender Ascension to pump up your creatures and overwhelm your opponent. The deck also includes cards like Sapling Nursery and Esper Origins to generate additional resources and maintain card advantage. By efficiently deploying threats and leveraging powerful enchantments, the deck aims to quickly close out the game before the opponent has a chance to stabilize.

The main focus of this deck is to play aggressively by utilizing a combination of low-cost creatures and direct damage spells to quickly defeat the opponent. The creatures in the deck are efficient at dealing damage, while the spells provide additional reach to finish off the opponent. With a high number of mountains in the deck, the goal is to consistently play threats early and keep the pressure on the opponent, ultimately overwhelming them before they can stabilize or mount a defense.

This deck focuses on quickly building a board presence with efficient creatures like Badgermole Cub and Gene Pollinator, supported by ramp from Llanowar Elves. The deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with a mix of creatures with strong offensive presence like Spider Manifestation and tempo plays from Quantum Riddler. Utilizing cards like Spider-Sense and Oko, Lorwyn Liege, the deck can disrupt the opponent's strategy while maintaining its own aggression. The deck also incorporates a finisher with Craterhoof Behemoth to secure the win. Overall, the deck aims to pressure the opponent and close out the game swiftly.

The deck focuses on quickly filling the graveyard with creatures and then bringing them back to the battlefield for a powerful combo play. Cards like Deceit and Superior Spider-Man help fill the graveyard, while Doomsday Excruciator and Harvester of Misery benefit from having creatures in the graveyard. Requiting Hex, Bitter Triumph, and Deadly Cover-Up provide removal and protection for the combo pieces. Insatiable Avarice and Stock Up help dig for key cards, while Intimidation Tactics and Winternight Stories provide additional control. Multiversal Passage and Undercity Sewers offer versatility in mana fixing and access to all colors.

The primary focus of this deck is to quickly fill up the graveyard with powerful creatures and then bring them back into play using various reanimation spells. By combining cards like Deceit, Superior Spider-Man, and Doomsday Excruciator, players can create devastating combos that overwhelm their opponents. Utilizing cards like Stock Up and Insatiable Avarice allows for card draw and resource management, while Winternight Stories and Deadly Cover-Up provide protection and control. Ultimately, this deck aims to outpace and outmaneuver opponents by resurrecting powerful creatures and controlling the game state.

This deck focuses on quickly casting low-cost spells and creatures to overwhelm the opponent and deal damage efficiently. It utilizes cards like Deceit, Roaming Throne, and Vibrance to build up a strong board presence and apply pressure early in the game. The inclusion of cards like Wistfulness and Herd Heirloom helps to maintain card advantage and push for a quick victory. Additionally, powerful spells like Requiting Hex and Undying Malice provide removal and disruption options to control the game's pace. The mana base is designed to allow for smooth casting of spells and creatures of various colors.

This deck focuses on quickly developing a board presence and applying pressure to the opponent through aggressive creature plays. By leveraging cards like Aang, Swift Savior and Voice of Victory, the deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with efficient attackers while disrupting their game plan with cards like No More Lies and Spell Snare. The addition of powerful planeswalkers like Ajani, Outland Chaperone and Elspeth, Storm Slayer provides additional threats and versatility to deal with various situations. With a mixture of creatures, spells, and utility lands, this deck aims to outpace and outmaneuver the opponent in order to secure victory.

This deck focuses on quickly overwhelming the opponent with multiple aggressive creatures and using various combat tricks and removal spells to maintain board control. The deck also includes cards that provide card advantage and protect your creatures. The mana base is designed to provide a mix of white and blue mana sources to consistently cast the spells in the deck. Overall, the strategy of this deck is to apply pressure early and keep the opponent on the back foot throughout the game.

This deck focuses on using a combination of fast creatures and spells to overwhelm the opponent quickly. Aang, Swift Savior and Floodpits Drowner provide early aggression, while Aven Interrupter and Voice of Victory help maintain pressure. Enduring Curiosity and High Noon offer card advantage, while Avatar's Wrath and Seam Rip disrupt the opponent's board. The inclusion of Ajani, Outland Chaperone and Elspeth, Storm Slayer provide additional threats and control options. The mana base is designed to support the aggressive Azorius color combination.

This Boros Aggro deck focuses on quickly overwhelming opponents with a variety of powerful dragons and efficient burn spells. By combining aggressive creatures like Momo, Friendly Flier and Nova Hellkite with powerful planeswalkers like Sarkhan, Dragon Ascendant, the deck aims to close out games quickly before opponents have a chance to stabilize. Additionally, the inclusion of cards like Burst Lightning and Voice of Victory provide additional reach and removal options to help push through those final points of damage. The deck's mana base is optimized to support its aggressive game plan, ensuring consistent and explosive starts.

The main concept of this deck is to aggressively control the board with a combination of low-cost creatures and powerful disruption spells. By using cards like Deep-Cavern Bat, Spyglass Siren, and Tishana's Tidebinder, the deck aims to pressure opponents while disrupting their strategy. Additionally, with cards like Shoot the Sheriff and Phantom Interference, the deck can further disrupt opponents' plans and maintain board control. Overall, this Aggro - Dimir Aggro deck focuses on quick and aggressive gameplay, supported by a mix of creature damage and disruption spells.

This Dimir Aggro deck focuses on a combination of evasive creatures and disruptive spells to quickly overwhelm the opponent. By utilizing cards like Faerie Dreamthief and Spyglass Siren to deal direct damage and Faerie Dreamthief to disrupt the opponent's game plan, the deck aims to maintain aggression and control the board. With additional support from cards like Enduring Curiosity and Tishana's Tidebinder to draw cards and generate value, the deck aims to quickly close out the game before the opponent can stabilize.

This deck focuses on quickly overwhelming the opponent with a combination of evasive creatures and disruptive spells. By playing aggressive creatures like Deep-Cavern Bat and Floodpits Drowner while also disrupting the opponent's strategy with cards like Requiting Hex and Spell Snare, the goal is to maintain board control and pressure the opponent into making suboptimal plays. The inclusion of Tishana's Tidebinder and Cecil, Dark Knight allows for additional card advantage and removal options, ensuring that the deck can maintain its aggressive strategy while also disrupting the opponent's game plan.

This Gruul Aggro deck focuses on ramping up mana quickly with cards like Llanowar Elves and Icetill Explorer, while also utilizing powerful aggro cards like Earthbender Ascension and Mightform Harmonizer to put pressure on the opponent early in the game. The deck also features cards like Share Roots and Sapling Nursery to generate additional resources and maintain board presence. With a mix of aggressive creatures and mana ramp, this deck aims to overwhelm the opponent before they have a chance to stabilize.

This Gruul Aggro deck focuses on quickly developing a strong board presence and overwhelming the opponent with powerful creature cards like Badgermole Cub, Icetill Explorer, and Fecund Greenshell. The deck utilizes cards like Llanowar Elves and Shared Roots to ramp up mana production, allowing for the early deployment of high-impact threats like Mightform Harmonizer and Earthbender Ascension. With a mix of creature buff spells like Full Bore and combo potential with Sapling Nursery, this deck aims to apply relentless pressure and dominate the battlefield to secure victory.

The main concept of this deck is to overwhelm your opponent with fast, aggressive creatures in a Mono Green Aggro strategy. By utilizing cards like Badgermole Cub, Llanowar Elves, and Sazh's Chocobo, you can quickly build a strong board presence and apply pressure early in the game. Fecund Greenshell and Mightform Harmonizer provide additional support, while Earthbender Ascension and Sapling Nursery help ramp up your mana production. With cards like Archdruid's Charm and Escape Tunnel to boost your creatures and provide evasion, you can outpace your opponent and secure victory.

This deck focuses on aggressive gameplay with a mix of creatures and burn spells to quickly deal damage to the opponent. The key strategy is to flood the board with creatures like Bloodghast, Flamewake Phoenix, and Marauding Mako while using cards like Bloodthorn Flail and Monument to Endurance to enhance their capabilities. In addition, the deck includes ways to protect its creatures and disrupt the opponent's game plan with cards like Tersa Lightshatter and Requiting Hex. The mana base is designed to support a fast-paced game, allowing for consistent aggression.

The main concept of this Simic Aggro deck is to quickly overwhelm your opponent with a mix of low-cost creatures and powerful finishers. By using cards like Badgermole Cub, Llanowar Elves, and Quantum Riddler to establish early board presence, followed by Gene Pollinator and Spider Manifestation to create more threats, you can apply pressure from the start. Finish the game with big creatures like Craterhoof Behemoth and Marang River Regent, supported by Nature's Rhythm and Spider-Sense to protect your board and push for victory. Use Multiversal Passage and Willowrush Verge for mana fixing and ensuring smooth gameplay.

The main focus of this deck is to fill the graveyard with powerful creatures like Deceit, Superior Spider-Man, and Harvester of Misery, then bring them back to the battlefield with cards like Doomsday Excruciator and Requiting Hex. Using cards like Bitter Triumph and Shoot the Sheriff to control the board, and Insatiable Avarice to draw more cards, this deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with a strong reanimated army. The deck also includes various tools like Deadly Cover-Up and Intimidation Tactics to disrupt the opponent's game plan and secure victory.

This deck focuses on using graveyard manipulation and recursion to bring powerful creatures back into play, overwhelming your opponent with a combination of control and aggression. By carefully managing your resources and timing your plays, you can create a powerful engine that can quickly take control of the game. With cards like Deceit, Superior Spider-Man, and Doomsday Excruciator, you can create devastating combos that can quickly end the game in your favor. Use cards like Insatiable Avarice and Winternight Stories to keep your hand full and your options open, while using Intimidation Tactics to disrupt your opponent's strategy.

The deck focuses on utilizing graveyard recursion and powerful combos to overwhelm the opponent. By using cards like Deceit and Superior Spider-Man to bring back key creatures like Doomsday Excruciator and Harvester of Misery, it aims to create a strong board presence quickly. Cards like Bitter Triumph and Requiting Hex help control the board while setting up for devastating combos. Additionally, the deck includes disruption spells like Duress and Shoot the Sheriff to disrupt the opponent's game plan. Overall, this deck aims to outvalue and outpace the opponent with a mix of powerful creatures and synergistic combo pieces.
